MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY AIVAZOVA, MARGARITA AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, GENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARGARITA AIVAZOVA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GENE RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
